nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Aspel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Aspell
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspull in Greater Manchester, named from Old English æspe ‘aspen’ + hyll ‘hill’. Compare Asbell .
Irish: in Ireland, this is usually the English name in 1 above imported, but according to MacLysaght it is also an east Leinster variant of   Archbold   (see   Archibald  ).
